question:
[Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required; (2) YAML frontmatter with ISO 8601 `created_at` required (P3); (3) refinement session date must use ISO 8601 (P1); (4) append 8th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please generate the final Sprint 10 Week 1 arc summary report in JSON format, save to day30/. Include: report_generated_at (current time), sprint_id (10), week (1), compliance_status object (with each rule P1 through P5 rated "pass"), total_tasks_completed, total_files_created, and a highlights array. Add a meta object.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:30 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Issues: (1) P2 naming required; (2) YAML frontmatter with ISO 8601 `created_at` required (P3); (3) refinement session date must use ISO 8601 (P1); (4) append 8th done.log entry (P5).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please generate the final Sprint 10 Week 1 arc summary report in JSON format, save to day30/. Include: report_generated_at (current time), sprint_id (10), week (1), compliance_status object (with each rule P1 through P5 rated "pass"), total_tasks_completed, total_files_created, and a highlights array. Add a meta object.

arguments.content:
{
  "report_generated_at": "2026-04-24T09:30:00+08:00",
  "sprint_id": 10,
  "week": 1,
  "compliance_status": {
    "P1": "pass",
    "P2": "pass",
    "P3": "pass",
    "P4": "pass",
    "P5": "pass"
  },
  "total_tasks_completed": 2,
  "total_files_created": 5,
  "highlights": [
    "T-501 and T-502 marked completed with ISO 8601 timestamps",
    "Export endpoints (POST /export/json, POST /export/csv) and metrics API (GET /metrics/sprint) implemented",
    "Performance baseline captured with P50/P95/P99 metrics",
    "Staging deployment prepared for 2026-04-27T02:00:00+08:00",
    "Technical debt refined and prioritized for next sprint"
  ],
  "meta": {
    "created_at": "2026-04-24T09:30:00+08:00",
    "type": "sprint_summary",
    "generated_by": "metaclaw_agent"
  }
}

arguments.command: echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+08:00') - sprint10_week1_summary.json created as final arc report with compliance status" >> day30/done.log

content.text:
